Table of Contents

Interface IRasterTypeProperties2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster type properties.

[Guid("7BD60984-38D6-4C55-94ED-1ED74A839727")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterTypeProperties2 : IRasterTypeProperties

Properties

AddRastersParameters 

IAddRastersParameters AddRastersParameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IAddRastersParameters

Aliases

All the names, in addition to the primary name, by which the raster type may be referenced.

IStringArray Aliases { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowSimplification

Indicates whether the function raster datasets generated by the raster type should be simplified before being added to the mosaic dataset by 'AddRasters' or 'SynchronizeItems' operations.

bool AllowSimplification { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

string DataSourceFilter { get; set; }

string

Description 

string Description { get; set; }

Property Value

string

EnableClipToFootprint 

bool EnableClipToFootprint { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

FactoryCLSID

The CLSID of the raster type factory that created the raster type.

UID FactoryCLSID { get; set; }

Property Value

UID

FirstAddTimeStamp 

DateTime FirstAddTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

InputDataSourceTypes 

int InputDataSourceTypes { get; set; }

Property Value

int

IsSensorRasterType

Indicates whether the raster type processes sensor data sources (as opposed to regular raster data sources).

bool IsSensorRasterType { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LastAddTimeStamp 

DateTime LastAddTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

LastSyncTimeStamp 

DateTime LastSyncTimeStamp { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

MissingBandAction

Indicates how the raster type behaves when a band requested by the mosaic dataset's band definition is not found in the input raster.

esriMissingBandAction MissingBandAction { get; set; }

Property Value

esriMissingBandAction

Indicates whether the raster type supports color correction.
